title: QUANTITATIVE ANALYSIS OF RESULTS OF PUBLIC ADMINISTRATION OF EMERGENCIES' RISKS OF EMERGENCE OF IN UKRAINE
author: Fedorchak V.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The quantitative analysis of results of public administration of emergencies’ risks in Ukraine is carried out in the article. In particular, the choice of a method of the quantitative analysis of results of public administration of emergencies’ risks in Ukraine is proved. The quantitative and qualitative structure of emergencies in Ukraine for the last periods is estimated.
